lines.speaker: Spike
lines.text: Welcome to Spike's Spikes. Want a mace?

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.text: You want a mace. Have a look.

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.text: Yeah. I'm Spike and I sell things with spikes, so Spike's Spikes.

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.text: No, my name is Memmis, but everyone calls me Spike.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do they call you Spike?

lines.speaker: Spike
lines.text: No idea. Maybe it's because I sell things with spikes. So, want a mace?
